channel.title: The Laplace Project — Blog & Papers
channel.description: Systems papers, technical postmortems, and benchmarks from building the Laplace stack.

item.title: Benchmarking the Laplace Engine: Methodology and First Real Numbers
item.description: A reproducible micro-benchmark harness for LplPlugin (allocators, ECS, fixed-point math, physics), with honest numbers, their variance, and the caveats that come with them.
